purpose: Blindly compare two temporary Ideakit artifacts without treating either as factual truth.
scoring: Score each dimension 1-5, cite artifact passages, then choose A, B, or tie. Verify cited claims separately.

dimensions.name: venture_originality
dimensions.question: Does the work contain a non-obvious thesis and value mechanism rather than category nouns with technology pasted on?

dimensions.name: reasoning_provenance
dimensions.question: Can consequential concepts be traced through Observed, Inferred, and Bet without laundering inference into fact?

dimensions.name: structural_diversity
dimensions.question: Do finalists differ in actor, mechanism, payer, wedge, or venture architecture rather than wording?

dimensions.name: entrepreneurial_quality
dimensions.question: Are trigger, buyer, wedge, first-user distribution, affordable loss, expansion, and possible compounding power credible?

dimensions.name: counter_case
dimensions.question: Does the work steelman disconfirming evidence, adoption friction, incumbent response, and what would make the bet wrong?

dimensions.name: founder_specificity
dimensions.question: Could this work only have come from this founder's means, taste, obsession, constraints, and desired game?

dimensions.name: editorial_quality
dimensions.question: Is the prose direct, specific, varied, and free of generator dialect or template theater?

dimensions.name: actionable_learning
dimensions.question: Does the output enable a concrete directional choice or cheap informative test without pretending certainty?

dimensions.name: causal_depth
dimensions.question: For a force brief, does reasoning reach changed behavior and structural rearrangement rather than stopping at direct mitigation?

dimensions.name: thesis_diversity
dimensions.question: Do finalists originate from different source consequences and causal mechanisms, not merely different buyers or business models?

dimensions.name: query_escape
dimensions.question: Did research use the independent language of ring-2/3 domains instead of repeating the force vocabulary in most queries?

dimensions.name: centroid_distance
dimensions.question: Does the portfolio move beyond the first direct categories most generators would associate with the force while keeping a defensible causal chain?

hard_failures: invented number, quote, customer, source, or result
unlabeled speculation presented as observed fact
generic distribution such as do marketing, content, partnerships, or go viral
portfolio filler included only to satisfy a framework
force-brief finalists all come from direct mitigation or one source consequence
business-model variety presented as causal thesis diversity
ring-3 speculation with no actor-to-institution causal chain
